title: PL Creative Team & a Manifesto
excerpt: You may have already seen the news on Instagram or on Becky's blog, but I thought I would also share it here. So excited to be a part of this group of talented ladies. I love Project Life and stuck…
body: You may have already seen the news on Instagram or on Becky's blog, but I thought I would also share it here. So excited to be a part of this group of talented ladies. I love Project Life and stuck with it for the first 6 months of 2012. You can see all my posts here. Since my schedule got a bit crazy with travels, I knew it wouldn't be worth trying to do it for the second half of the year. It's seriously my favorite album to look through for many reasons. I will do a future post going more in depth about my process and why I love it. But for now, I am digging this manifesto, found via Design Sponge.
